name: aleph-tools
description: Shared tools gateway with OCR and image conversion services for Aleph projects.

scripts.deploy:dry-run:dev: pnpm deploy:generate:dev && pnpm --dir apps/gateway exec wrangler deploy --dry-run --containers-rollout=none --config wrangler.generated-dev.json
scripts.deploy:dry-run:prod: pnpm deploy:generate:prod && pnpm --dir apps/gateway exec wrangler deploy --dry-run --containers-rollout=none --config wrangler.generated-prod.json
scripts.deploy:migrate:dev: pnpm deploy:generate:dev && pnpm --dir apps/gateway exec wrangler d1 migrations apply aleph-tools-dev --remote --config wrangler.generated-dev.json
scripts.deploy:migrate:prod: pnpm deploy:generate:prod && pnpm --dir apps/gateway exec wrangler d1 migrations apply aleph-tools-prod --remote --config wrangler.generated-prod.json
scripts.deploy:dev: pnpm deploy:generate:dev && pnpm --dir apps/gateway exec wrangler deploy --config wrangler.generated-dev.json
scripts.deploy:prod: pnpm deploy:generate:prod && pnpm --dir apps/gateway exec wrangler deploy --config wrangler.generated-prod.json
